# Anthropic protocol fixtures

The anthropic protocol's parity expectations live in
`tests/anthropic-parity/` at the repo root: an oracle generated by
running Pi's real `streamAnthropic`/`streamSimpleAnthropic` (vendored
`@anthropic-ai/sdk`) against a scripted local stub
(`scripts/anthropic-oracle`), replayed through pi-rs by
`crates/pi-rs-ai/tests/anthropic_parity.rs`. The hand-derived expectation
files that used to live here are superseded by that oracle.

Remaining input:

- `replay_basic.sse` — a `/v1/messages` streaming transcript
  (message_start → thinking/text/tool blocks → message_delta →
  message_stop, including `ping`, `signature_delta`, and split
  `input_json_delta` frames), consumed as scripted stub *input* by
  `crates/pi-rs-app/tests/anthropic_replay.rs`. Its protocol-level
  handling is pinned by the `stream-rich` anthropic-parity case, which
  embeds the same shapes.
